prompt: Button opened and hero is in the big blind with J4o. Which simple action fits best at the checkpoint under out-of-position pressure?
why_v1: Out of position with a weak offsuit hand, the disciplined checkpoint answer is still to fold.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Facing a button open from the big blind, J4o is too weak to continue out of position, so the disciplined answer is to fold.
